title: WAY 2 iMMERSIVE
description: way 2 iMMERSIVE is a compilation of different mods to make a full immersive experience!
body:
# Welcome to way 2 iMMERSIVE

this modpack has several different mods that provide experiences like music,weather,fog,texture and this mod has **NO** shaders so anyone with any computer can run it!

*note you can add shaders but its not recommended!*

this modpack took lots of insperation from [MC+/Recrafted](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=50YQnLVI7yM&pp=ygUDTUMr)


**what does this modpack do/add?**

way 2 immersive adds realistic aspects without shaders which is very similar to [MC+/Recrafted](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=50YQnLVI7yM&pp=ygUDTUMr) fun fact this modpack originated as a [MC+/Recrafted](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=50YQnLVI7yM&pp=ygUDTUMr) copy until it turned into its own thing!

**what should i play with?**

i reccomend playing on a high end server with friends for the best experience (have fun with the end fight :) )

*NOTE* 
if you have any issues or problems please dm me on discord (F0_olish) i have open dms and will reply back usually within a day MAX  if this changes in the future  im working on a discord server

*ps make sure you allocate a lot of ram for this pack or you will **SUFFER** *

Q/A

**will you update to latest versions?**

unfortunetly no unless all the mods in the pack magically update to 1.21.8 but thats probably not going to happen any time soon, i really want to update to 1.21.8 but most of the mods im using would have to be abandoned if i wanted to update if you want to see a seperate version thats on 1.21.8 dm me (F0_olish)

**the end fight is too HARD**

if the fight is too hard for you unlink the pack in the modrinth app and remove any mod that refers to (end, ending or dragon)

**where can i suggest things for the modpack?**

dm on discord (F0_olish)

**I want to help with the modpack**
im not really accepting help with adding mods right now but if you are willing to bugtest new versions for free dm me!

**What happened to version 1.0.0 with the modpack and other versions?**

i had to remove and add mods for it to comply with modrinth, yes i still kept these versions but they will not be released 


**Im getting a weird puddle error**

relaunch the game and reinstall the modpack until it works, if that fails for you remove the puddles mod from the pack


**im getting a java 21 error and it automatically closes the game**

relaunch the game


CREDITS
F0_olish - made the pack
BoogerSimon - Bug tester
Uku - i kinda stole ukus code for the title credits because i cant code for my life :(
BouncingElf10 - updated the animated mojang logo mod so i could have it in my modpack :)

thats it for the description if your here and actually read it then good for you!
